channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zero tariff policy boosts economy
item.description: Masimba Makwembere CHINA’s ambassador to Zimbabwe Zhou Ding says his country’s new zero-tariff policy on imports from African countries will help boost... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subs via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: AfDB backs Zimbabwe debt arrears plan with targeted funding boost @AfDB_Group
item.description: Channel Africa Zimbabwe’s efforts to resolve its longstanding debt arrears have received support after the African Development Bank Group approved a $4 million grant aimed at strengthening the country’s re-engagement with international creditors. The funding will support the Zimb via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Before we spoke, I inspected her papers – South African anti-immigrant activist Phakel’umthakathi on Zimbabwean ex-girlfriend
item.description: IOL Actor and anti-immigrant activist Nkosikhona “Phakel’umthakathi” Ndabandaba has pushed back against viral social media claims that he is married to a Zimbabwean woman, dismissing the allegations as false and misleading. Ndabandaba has rubbished the claims, saying they are spe via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
